files.00_Overview.md: Add Learning Objectives section. Add Key Takeaways section. Add estimated reading time. The 'เป้าหมาย' section should be reformatted to follow 3W structure (What will be learned, Why it matters, How it will be applied). Consider adding visual learning roadmaps.

global_strategy: This folder lacks consistent 3W Framework application across files. All pattern files need Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways sections. There's significant redundancy - each file contains comparison tables with other patterns (e.g., Strategy vs Template Method appears in both files). Create a separate 'Pattern Comparison Guide' file to consolidate cross-pattern comparisons. The 'Applying to Your Own Code' sections vary in quality - standardize this structure with concrete CFD engine examples. Consider adding a practical capstone file that demonstrates combining multiple patterns in a real solver component. The Thai/English mixing is inconsistent - decide on a language strategy per section.
